note_main_file: id=1 Improved Frostbolt (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[32,0,0] carrier=Frostbolt(116). max_rank=5, value_per_rank=-100ms. Confirmed correct — no changes.
id=3 Empowered Frostbolt (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[32,0,0] carrier=Frostbolt(116). max_rank=5, value_per_rank=2 (DAMAGE PCT). Confirmed correct — marked verified=true.

id=5 Piercing Ice (spec_tree=-1) — flags updated from [32,0,0] to all-ones. All-ones chosen because no shared Frost-only bit exists; previous narrow flags only targeted Frostbolt while the talent buffs all Frost spell damage. Marked verified=true.
_notes.note_shared_mask2_bit3: mask2 bit3 (=8) is a SHARED MAGE marker bit on: Fireball, FrostfireBolt, Pyroblast, PoM, Arcane Power, Evocation. Combined-flag entries always drop mask2 to avoid false matches.
_notes.note_no_frost_shared_bit: No confirmed shared bit exists across all Frost spells. Frost Nova, CoC, Ice Lance, Blizzard, and Frostbolt all have unique mask0 bits. FrostfireBolt uses mask1 bit12. Broad Frost affixes use all-ones (e.g. Piercing Ice) or targeted unique-bit OR's.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Frost Nova
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[64,0,0]=mask0 bit6 (0x00000040). Frost Nova(122) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. No shared MAGE marker bits. Frost Nova cooldown -4s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -4000ms). WotLK: 2r at -4/-8s.

talent_affixes._todo: Frostbite (3r, tier 1) — Chilling effects have a 5/10/15% chance to freeze the target for 5 sec. Proc-based freeze, not implementable as SpellMod.
Shatter (5r, tier 2) — Increases crit chance of spells against frozen targets by 10/20/30/40/50%. Conditional (target is frozen), not implementable as flat SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Arctic Reach
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[525024,0,0]=0x000802E0. OR of Frostbolt mask0 bit5(32)|FrostNova mask0 bit6(64)|CoC mask0 bit9(512)|Blizzard mask0 bit7+bit19(524416). No shared bits — all bits are unique to each spell. Carrier Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Range/radius of Frostbolt, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, and Blizzard +10%/rank (RANGE PCT: 10). WotLK: 2r at +10/+20%.

talent_affixes.name: Piercing Ice
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — no confirmed shared Frost-only bit exists across all frost spells. All-ones is accepted scope for Frost spec affix. Carrier Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. All Mage spell damage +2%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 2). Mirrors corrected main-file id=5. WotLK: 3r at +2/+4/+6%.

talent_affixes._todo: Icy Veins (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

Permafrost (3r, tier 4) — Increases duration of Chill effects by 1/2/3s and reduces target's movement speed by an additional 4/7/10%. Non-linear movement reduction and aura duration modifier — not implementable as a single flat SpellMod.

Ice Floes (3r, tier 4) — Reduces cooldown of Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Block by 7/14/20%. Non-linear progression (not equal increments) and includes Ice Block — not modelable with linear value_per_rank.

Winter's Chill (3r, tier 4) — Frost damage spells have a 33/66/100% chance to apply Winter's Chill, increasing target's spell crit chance taken by 1%. Proc-based debuff application, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Frostbolt
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[32,0,0]=mask0 bit5 (0x00000020). Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE from main-file id=1. No shared MAGE marker bits. Frostbolt damage +2%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 2). Mirrors main-file id=3 (now verified=true). WotLK: 5r at +2/+4/+6/+8/+10%. NOTE: talent also gives +5% crit coefficient per rank — a second entry (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT +500/rank, same flags) can be added if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Cold Snap (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Chilled to the Bone
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[131104,4096,0]. OR of: Frostbolt mask0 bit5(32)|IceLance(30455) mask0 bit17(131072)|FrostfireBolt(44614) mask1 bit12(4096). mask2=8 dropped from FrostfireBolt to avoid shared-bit contamination. Carrier Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Frostbolt, Frostfire Bolt, and Ice Lance damage +1%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 1). WotLK: 5r at +1/+2/+3/+4/+5%.

talent_affixes._todo: Ice Barrier (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Shattered Barrier (2r, tier 7) — When Ice Barrier is destroyed, 50/100% chance to freeze nearby enemies. Proc on barrier break, not implementable as SpellMod.

Arctic Winds (5r, tier 7) — Frost spell damage +1/2/3/4/5% and melee hit chance against you -1/2/3/4/5%. Mixed passive damage + defense — DAMAGE PCT part partially overlaps with id=540 (Piercing Ice); not modeled to avoid redundant stacking.
Fingers of Frost (2r, tier 8) — Chill effects have a 5/10% chance to trigger Fingers of Frost, causing next 2 spells to act as if target is frozen. Proc-based trigger, not implementable as SpellMod.
Brain Freeze (3r, tier 8) — Frost spells have a 5/10/15% chance to cause next Fireball or Frostfire Bolt to be instant and free. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Summon Water Elemental (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
